assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response mentions deprecated API usage but references 1.31→1.32 upgrade, not 1.30 as specified in the expectation

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes dedicated section on admission webhook compatibility issues with specific commands and mitigation steps

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response mentions checking system component resource requirements and includes commands to check resource allocation on nodes

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check kube-system pod health and restart procedures for crashlooping components

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response includes the exact command 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated'

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions service mesh (Istio/ASM) and advises verifying control plane version supports Kubernetes 1.32

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands to check events across namespaces and specific event types, though not specifically mentioning readiness probe failures

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes dedicated section on HPA/VPA behavioral changes with specific commands to check scaling decisions and events
